title: Content guidelines
description: Copy rules with do/don't examples plus terminology table

sections.rules: One entry per content rule from the component's Figma documentation. Each rule has: title (the rule name), description (what the rule means), do/dont text (correct vs incorrect label text), doExample/dontExample (concrete example strings shown in the Do/Don't boxes). Must include ALL rules — never summarize or skip.
sections.terminology: Optional table of terms specific to this component. Each entry: term name + how to use it correctly. Empty array if no component-specific terminology.

qualityRules: Every content rule from the component's Figma page must be included — never summarize multiple rules into one
do/dont must use realistic component copy, not placeholder text like 'Good text' / 'Bad text'
doExample/dontExample must be concrete strings that could appear on the actual component
Rule titles must be concise (2-5 words), descriptions must explain the reasoning
terminology entries should only include component-specific terms, not general DS vocabulary
